rationale: Strong regulatory frameworks, formal recycling infrastructure, high labor standards. Low informal processing risk.
Improving regulatory capacity but significant variation. Some documented informal processing sites. Moderate risk.
Limited formal recycling capacity in most countries. Documented informal e-waste processing in several major importers (India, Philippines, Morocco). High risk.
Minimal formal recycling infrastructure. Highest rates of informal processing, open burning, and acid leaching. Severe health and environmental risk documented.
